assessor_1_raw: Three-way ablation (GNN, MLP, random-adjacency GNN) provides complete decomposition of capacity vs structure contributions. Unusually rigorous design. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Per-node LSTM temporal module within GNN architecture correctly handles the spatial-temporal nature of the problem. This is a standard spatiotemporal GNN design pattern. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Retraining on full 18-month training set after CV selection is standard practice. Final model sees all available training data before evaluation. Verdict: defense_wins.
